codeReview.summary: The commit updates the requested Rust dependency requirements in Cargo.toml and lockfiles, including strsim to 0.11.x and keeping tower on 0.5.x, with no functional code-path regressions visible in the diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-level commit guidance conflicts with repo-level commit guidance: mission AGENTS allows only feat/fix/refactor, while repo AGENTS explicitly allows chore; this creates ambiguity for dependency-only features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/.factory/missions/8fa2796a-8b48-4fd7-a205-fbe53ec6442c/AGENTS.md ("Commit message format: feat... OR fix... OR refactor...") vs /Users/vriesd/projects/csv-align/AGENTS.md (allowed types include chore); reviewed commit is ce56692 with message 'chore(deps): bump rust patch dependencies'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill mandates strict red→green TDD language, but dependency-only bump work is validated through compatibility/build/test sweeps rather than introducing failing tests first; procedure text could explicitly carve out this dependency-upgrade case.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/vriesd/projects/csv-align/.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md step 3 requires red→green TDD; transcript skeleton for session 11a23ae9-61a9-4979-9040-e46504d2baa3 shows dependency and lockfile updates plus full validation runs, with no new failing test step.

summary: Reviewed mission records, transcript skeleton, rust-worker skill, and commit ce56692 diff/stat. Feature implementation satisfies the dependency bump scope and expected behavior checks in records; no blocking or non-blocking code defects were identified in the committed changes.
